actionUnits.condition: Invoke physics-trigger enter for platform2 (3). Scene MonoBehaviour (id: 666190386, guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) is AttachToElevator from the provided script. BoxCollider (id: 666190388) currently has m_IsTrigger = 0; at least one collider in the pair must be marked as trigger and one collider must have a Rigidbody for OnTriggerEnter to fire. The serialized field 'player' is unassigned (fileID 0). As coded, OnTriggerEnter will only set parent if (gameObject == player) is true; to cover the 'true' branch, the 'player' reference must be set to this GameObject (platform2 (3)) before the test; otherwise only the event callback itself is covered with no parenting side effects. Expected behavior when condition met: player.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, true).

Invoke physics-trigger exit for platform2 (3) after the prior enter. This tests OnTriggerExit in AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour id: 666190386). Same prerequisites: one collider must be a trigger and one must have a Rigidbody. To exercise the 'true' branch of the if-statement on exit, ensure 'player' is set to platform2 (3); expected behavior when condition met: player.transform.parent = null.
